note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Prometheus HTTP API typically unauthenticated behind a private network/reverse proxy; Grafana uses API tokens / basic auth / OAuth.

expectedFailureResponseShape.error: invalid parameter "query": parse error: unexpected end of input

commonIntegrationFailure: PromQL parse errors (status=error, errorType=bad_data); scrape target DOWN (up=0) when /metrics is unreachable or the scrape config job name mismatches; Grafana datasource pointed at the wrong Prometheus URL.
preventionRule: Expose a /metrics endpoint matching the scrape job name; validate PromQL before issuing; point Grafana's datasource at the reachable Prometheus base URL; keep monitoring out of the app's request path.
